## What & why

## Checklist
- [ ] Lint, format, and types are clean (`make check`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`make test`) and new behavior is covered
- [ ] The keyboard lock is still released in all exit paths (no path leaves the keyboard captured)
- [ ] The exit combo still works (`Ctrl+Alt+Q` held)
- [ ] Version/provenance still surfaces (startup log + on-screen About)
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior changed
